candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue total; valid fallback if primary sales label changes across years.
Direct operating sales/revenue line and most specific top-line measure.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for revenue label changes across years; Net Sales is preferred as the more specific operating sales line.

Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Merchandise' from the full Income Statement preview because it is the clearest direct cost/cost of sales line beneath revenue. Manual review is required since this was chosen outside the candidate list.

candidates.why: Overhead-type operating expense component; not a total and distinct from COGS and D&A.
Classic SG&A overhead component.
Residual operating overhead bucket; acceptable SG&A component when not a total.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present among the labels shown, so selected the best overhead component rows and excluded Merchandise, depreciation/amortization/impairment, and finance items.

candidates.why: Related to R&D but is amortization, which is not the preferred current-period R&D expense.
Explicit R&D expense line; best semantic match even if preview values are empty.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit income statement R&D expense label. Excluded amortization of R&D because XRD should capture expense, not amortization.

candidates.why: Appears to be an alternate capitalization/version of finance cost line but preview is empty.
Broad finance cost line with populated values; suitable fallback if direct interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest-related but too narrow to represent total interest expense.
Finance-related but partial/subcomponent, not preferred over broader interest/finance expense lines.
Direct interest-expense-style label; strong semantic match if populated in some years.
Best direct match to target interest expense; preferred first in priority list.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and too narrow to represent total interest expense.

variables.notes: Using a priority list: explicit interest expense labels first, then broader financial expenses as fallback. Excluded lease-interest-only and other partial finance rows.

candidates.why: Not a shareholders' equity line; not appropriate for book equity.
Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Valid fallback, but less preferred because it could include NCI if present.
Balancing/subtotal row and should not be preferred over explicit equity lines.
Balancing row, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Not an equity line.
Total balance sheet equation, not book equity.

variables.notes: Selected parent shareholders' equity as the preferred BE measure because it excludes any potential non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive income subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line.

variables.notes: No balance-sheet line for minority interest/non-controlling interests is present. Since BE uses parent equity directly, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
